message:
style(fwc): formatting cleanup across batch_file, catalog, extract, pipeline_defs, readiness, schema_nav, search

Reformat writeln!/filter/find closures to single-line style where they
fit, multi-line map_or_else closures in schema_nav, and modernize
map_or(true, |b| ...) to is_none_or(|b| ...) in search.rs.

No logic changes — pure formatting/style.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
